title: Intensely Creamy Spanish Sea Bass Iberico Confit
description: A sweet and creamy Spanish dish featuring sea bass fillets, slow-cooked to perfection with jamon iberico, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the sea bass fillets with salt, black pepper, and paprika
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant
Add the jamon iberico slices and cook for 2 minutes until crispy
Add the sea bass fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12 minutes
Remove the skillet from the oven and add the heavy cream and lemon juice
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes
